svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="optimize-results" id="optimize-results"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-164" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="540" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="优化效果对比 (优化前 -> 优化后)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="450" width="900" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="HUB" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="SSR 优化
效果对比" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="410" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="TTFB 首屏时间
优化前 1.8s → 优化后 0.5s" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="62" width="220" x="70" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="白屏时间
优化前 1.5s → 优化后 0.3s" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="62" width="220" x="310" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="页面秒开率
优化前 65% → 优化后 98%" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="62" width="220" x="550" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="QPS 上限
优化前 500 → 优化后 2000+" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="62" width="120" x="790" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="系统整体性能
相对于 SPA 提升 80% 以上" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="62" width="320" x="330" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EA1" edge="1" parent="1" source="HUB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.2;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="R1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EA2" edge="1" parent="1" source="HUB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.4;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="R2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EA3" edge="1" parent="1" source="HUB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.6;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="R3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EA4" edge="1" parent="1" source="HUB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.8;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="R4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EA5" edge="1" parent="1" source="R2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="R5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 250, 252), rgb(21, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 898px; height: 1px; padding-top: 13px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
